name: content-registry
description: Register content with cryptographic hashes and timestamps, verify integrity, search the registry, and track full provenance chains. Uses SHA-256 hashing.

tools.name: register_content
tools.description: Register content with a cryptographic hash and timestamp. Returns a registration ID for future verification.

tools.name: verify_content
tools.description: Verify registered content integrity by comparing hashes. Provide content + registration_id or expected_hash.

tools.name: search_registry
tools.description: Search the registry by title/tag query, hash, author, content type, or status.

tools.name: get_provenance_chain
tools.description: Get the full provenance trail for a registered content item - all events from registration through any modifications or verifications.

tools.name: revoke_registration
tools.description: Revoke a content registration. Content record is preserved but marked as revoked.
